name: Lemony Baked Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Place dried tomato bits in the bottom of a baking dish or pan.
2. Arrange chicken pieces in a single layer over the tomato bits.
3. Pour lemon juice and chicken stock over the chicken.
4. Sprinkle lemon peel, rosemary, salt, and pepper over all.
5. Cover and bake at 350°F until tender, about 40 to 45 minutes.
6. Before serving, spoon juices over top of chicken.
